Yes, it is dishwasher safe. Is this silverware set polished thoroughly on all surfaces? Our silverware set is meticulously polished on every surface, both the outer and inner sides of each piece, resulting in a brilliant, mirror - like finish; And the surface is very smooth, your mouth will also be very safe when dining. Are the handles designed to provide a comfortable grip? The handle curves are designed to match hand posture. The appropriate size and weight offer a more comfortable grip and reduce fatigue during use. How to erase fingerprints or water stains from stainless steel cutlery set? Wash cutlery set with soap and water, then dry immediately with a soft cloth. For stubborn stains, use Neutral detergent and water before drying. Is it suitable for everyday household use or parties?
